column1: Patient admitted with acute myocardial infarction. Prescribed Aspirin 81mg daily and Lisinopril for hypertension management. History of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.
Subject exhibits symptoms of severe sepsis. Administered Vancomycin and Piperacillin-Tazobactam. Lab results show elevated lactic acid.
Patient diagnosed with Stage II breast cancer. Starting chemotherapy with Paclitaxel. HER2-neu status is positive.
